backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a guestbook backend with user profiles, guestbook entries (add/update/delete/query), and role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: rebuilding Leaflet map integration using npm instead of CDN in ATMapPage/WorldMapPage, and cleaning up index.html to remove conflicting Leaflet CDN tags.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the VTH Guest Book app that loads Leaflet CSS and JS via unpkg CDN and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for the feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages inside a shared AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component that explains the VTH Guest Book project and defines what a Vicarious Thru-Hiker is.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout component providing the sticky header with VTH branding, main content outlet, footer with About button, and bottom navigation bar for Feed/Sign/World/AT map routes.
A dialog component for editing an existing guestbook entry, managing form state for name, trail name, comment, current location, and favorite place with geocoding support via PlaceSearchField.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: A small informational card component that displays a legend hint telling users to tap a pin to see entry details.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: A styled SVG map pin button component that visually changes color and scale when selected.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: A search input component that queries the geocoding API for place names and lets the user select from multiple results, calling an onSelect callback with the chosen GeocodingResult.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching guestbook entries and mutations for adding, updating, and deleting entries via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines a warm earthy OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, and adds touch-friendly sizing and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: A utility module that queries the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API to search for places by name and returns normalized GeocodingResult objects with display name and coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Utility functions for formatting guestbook entry data, including author labels, timestamps, coordinates, and encoding/decoding place names embedded in comment strings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` helper that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that renders the root component wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Form page for creating a new guestbook entry, supporting optional current location (via geolocation or search) and a favorite AT place, with place names encoded into the comment.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Displays a Leaflet map showing pins for guestbook entries that have a favorite Appalachian Trail place, with popups showing author name and place name.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Detail view for a single guestbook entry showing full content, location badges, and edit/delete controls restricted to the entry's creator.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Lists all guestbook entries sorted by newest first as clickable cards with author, timestamp, comment preview, and location badges.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Displays a Leaflet world map with pins for guestbook entries that have a current location, showing author, place name, and comment preview in popups.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, fonts, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the VTH Guest Book app, recording existing completed features (Leaflet npm integration and index.html cleanup) and one pending fix request to repair the AddEntryPage form submission flow.
